历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 18349 → 21743 → 29405 → 28242 → 27864. After a significant drop in 2023, it slightly recovered in the past two years, with a baseline of about 27864 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Physics Category was 19, 19, 20, 20, 20 from 2021 to 2025, and it will significantly increase to 35 in 2026, a 75% expansion, greatly increasing admission opportunities and easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 157th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a continuous rise in recent years (198 in 2021 → 157 in 2026), steadily improving comprehensive strength. No significant negative public opinion incidents in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking 79th, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms, showing no signs of overheating or cooling in applications. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Yanbian University did not have any disciplines rated A- or above, with missing data on advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., are highly recommended majors, while Clinical Medicine and Nursing are recommended, with related majors having high popularity. The total number of Gansu Province college entrance exam takers in 2026 is approximately 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% from 2025 (about 179,800), with an estimated 147,700 Physics Category candidates (+21.6%), intensifying competition. Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Prefecture, Jilin Province, far from Gansu, requiring consideration of regional preferences for cross-province applications. The university's enrollment share in Gansu is about 1.2%–2.0%, not a major source of students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 27864, the 75% enrollment expansion in 2026 reducing admission difficulty (ranking number increases), the approximately 21.6% increase in local Physics Category candidates intensifying competition (ranking number decreases), and the continuous rise in university rankings enhancing attractiveness, the expansion effect dominates. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly drop compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 40203, with a range of 39703–40703.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Electronic Information Engineering
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics)
- Chemistry (Chemistry, Applied Chemistry)
- Civil Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration
- Tourism Management
- Food Science and Engineering
- Physics (including Teacher Training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With the significant enrollment expansion in Physics Category in 2026, the predicted ranking range is 39703–40703, notably lower than the 2025 baseline, greatly increasing admission opportunities. It is recommended that candidates within the predicted ranking range focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 37000) can focus on popular majors like Electronic Information Engineering. Candidates near the upper limit should prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在全国范围内持续保持较高报考热度，临床医学尤为突出。甘肃省内医学类招生规模有限，考生报考外省医学类院校的意愿较强。延边大学地处东北边疆，地域吸引 力一般，但211层次和医学专业设置仍能吸引中等偏上分数段考生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次趋势与2026年招生计划持平的情况，预计2026年延边大学医学类最低录取位次约为27201名，较2025年（27001名）略有下降（更易进），波动区间为26793–27609名 。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Yanbian University's medical category in Gansu Province over the past five years are: 2021: 17,269 (planned 6 students), 2022: 16,550 (planned 6 students), 2023: 29,405 (planned 10 students, expansion caused a significant drop in ranking), 2024: 26,784 (planned 10 students), 2025: 27,001 (planned 10 students). After the expansion in 2023, the ranking dropped sharply from the 16,000 range to the 29,000 range, and stabilized in the 26,700–27,000 range in 2024–2025. The 2026 enrollment plan for the medical category remains 10 students (Clinical Medicine 3, Pharmacy 2, Nursing 5), unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yanbian University is a national key university under the 211 Project and a Double First-Class construction university (not 985), located in Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin Province. As a comprehensive university, its medical disciplines have a certain influence in the region. The 211 status still attracts candidates, but the remote location (far from Gansu) somewhat limits the enthusiasm for application.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to maintain high application enthusiasm nationwide, especially Clinical Medicine. The enrollment scale for medical categories within Gansu Province is limited, and candidates have a strong willingness to apply to medical schools in other provinces. Yanbian University is located in the northeastern border area, with average geographical appeal, but its 211 level and medical program offerings still attract candidates in the upper-middle score range.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the historical ranking trends and the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Yanbian University's medical category in 2026 will be approximately 27,201, slightly lower (easier to enter) than 2025 (27,001), with a fluctuation range of 26,793–27,609.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety.
